records.target: Launch Astrid Lindqvist - Full Platform Presence
records.notes: Astrid live on Fanvue, Instagram, Reddit, Threads, Snapchat, TikTok with consistent daily content pipeline. LoRA v1 by Apr 3, v2 by Apr 5. Content library 100+ images by Apr 10, 10+ videos by Apr 12. All platforms posting daily by Apr 15. DRI: Beno (strategic), Lux (content), Kat (ops/compliance).
One-pager pitch, proposal template, pricing sheet (3 tiers), scope of work, service agreement. Must complete before closing David.

records.target: Document all Lagoon SOPs for full remote operation
records.notes: Moving to Puerto Escondido May 2026. Lagoon must run without daily Beno presence. WA bridge live. Need written+video SOPs for: vehicle checkout, return inspection, damage assessment, daily fleet check, booking confirmation, WA inquiry handling. Train Dubi or on-site manager.

records.target: Complete Sirewall mix design trip and receive Phase 1 construction cost estimate
records.notes: Trip: March 8-13, Puerto Escondido. Meeting Michael Palethorpe on-site. Deliverables: completed soil/mix analysis, finalized Sirewall mix design, written Phase 1 construction cost estimate. This is the critical path unlock for the entire CRETE build timeline.

records.target: Launch Power Independence Academy: Stripe connected, funnel live, first $1,000 USD revenue
records.notes: Product is FULLY BUILT. Sales page copy complete. DFY workflow complete. Systeme.io account live. ONLY BLOCKER: Beno must connect Stripe in Systeme.io (Settings > Payment). Then: replace checkout URLs in 4 funnel pages. Run paid traffic (Meta/TikTok ads). $27/$47/$97 tiers. Target: first $1K USD in March. Nova (Product Dev) to own funnel optimization.

records.target: File all CRETE Phase 1 construction permits and select contractor by May 2026
records.notes: Post-Sirewall trip deliverables: Michael Palethorpe cost estimate in hand → identify permit requirements for rammed-earth construction in Oaxaca state → file permits with local municipality → select and contract Sirewall-qualified builder. Piia to track permit deadlines. Michael Palethorpe is technical lead.

records.target: Complete MVP spec and wireframe for Puerto Escondido Uber Eats-style food delivery app
records.notes: Local delivery app for Puerto Escondido: restaurant listing, order placement, driver dispatch, payment processing. Unique angle: serve the growing expat/tourist market in Puerto Escondido + Oaxaca coast. MVP scope: customer app, restaurant dashboard, driver app. Zara (Dev & Automation) to own tech spec. Nova to own product design.
OpenClaw config template, skill packages, MC clone template, onboarding questionnaire, Pulse cadence cron configs.

First paying subscriber + first PPV sale. Welcome funnel converts followers. Min $500 in Q2. Welcome sequence Apr 7, first PPV Apr 10, first sub Apr 30, first PPV sale May 7, $500 cumulative Jun 30. DRI: Beno, Siren, Vex.

records.target: Maintain Lagoon booking pipeline and revenue during Puerto Escondido transition
records.notes: WA bridge is live. Goal: zero revenue drop during Beno travel (Mar 8-13 Sirewall trip). Test: can Lagoon handle a full week without Beno? Measure: inquiries responded to, bookings confirmed, any incidents handled. This is a dry run for the May move to Puerto Escondido.

records.target: Complete MVP spec for Farmer/Worker Direct-to-Customer marketplace app
records.notes: Local farming marketplace: farmers and workers list produce/services directly, customers buy with no middleman. Serves Oaxaca coastal region. Supports local farmers (Beno farming vision aligns here). MVP: farmer profile, product listing, customer ordering, simple payment. Leverage relationships from farm/off-grid research.

records.target: Launch Lagoon upsell system: eco-yacht packages + add-ons targeting +20% per-booking revenue
records.notes: Current eco-yacht ad running unmonitored on FB Ads (find login). Design packages: 4hr yacht trip + ATV combo, sunset yacht + dinner, adventure package (ATV + UTV + yacht). Add-on menu: fuel packages, insurance upgrade, guided tour option. WA bridge can upsell at booking confirmation. Target: average booking value +20% = 95K → 114K MXN/month.
Run discovery session. Map SEVA business (5 Pillars, CCM, Critical Number). Send proposal. Close deal. Collect payment.

Pre-recorded Astrid videos as live on TikTok via OBS→RTSP→phone spoof. 3+ accounts at 1K+ followers. Nath: $3.5K/day in 33 days. OBS+Aitum Apr 7, 3 videos Apr 15, test live Apr 20, 3 accounts 1K+ May 15, regular schedule May 30. DRI: Beno, Fangs, Vex.

records.target: Implement Lagoon Google Ads conversion tracking and optimize for 30% more bookings
records.notes: Google Ads running but no formal conversion tracking. Install GA4 + conversion tracking. Split test: current ads vs new creatives. Target: 30% more bookings from same ad spend. Rex (Marketing & Growth agent) to own this. Also: find FB Ads login (eco-yacht ad currently running unmonitored).
Full build: OpenClaw instance, MC dashboard, configured agents, Pulse cadence, memory seeded with SEVA context.

records.target: AI Chatter System Deployed on Diamond Standard
records.notes: AI chatter on Diamond Standard 12-step SOP + Jaka scripts. 90%+ autonomous by Jun 15. PPV ladder: $10→$15→$19→$19→$54→$90. Segmentation: Daddy/Name/Sissy/Virgin/Regular. Infra Apr 12, trained Apr 15, tested Apr 20, live Apr 25. DRI: Beno, Siren, Kat.

10+ GeeLark cloud phones ($0.38/day) with unique fingerprints, PacketStream proxies. Running IG slave + TikTok warmup accounts. NOT AliRemote. Scale: 5 by Apr 5, 10 by May 1, 15-20 by Jun 15. DRI: Beno (setup), Fangs (management), Kat (tracking).
Michael Palethorpe or network referral. Start warm conversation, schedule discovery if possible.
